text.title: Feature Flag Rollout and Targeting Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: User flips between control and treatment between two page navigations.
Returning user sees different variant after logout/login.
antipattern.fix: Bucket on account id; fall back to stable device id only.

antipattern.symptom: Flag jumps 5% → 100% in one step; regression caught only after global blast.
antipattern.fix: Enforce ramp steps + waits; reject ramp scripts without sleep / observation period.
